situation: audit-2026-07-02-002 finding AS-EC-010: watchdog.sh line 54 uses `pgrep -c claude` which matches ANY process with 'claude' in its name (other user sessions, claude-code-proxy, scripts named *claude*, etc). Watchdog is project-level health monitor — should only care about Claude processes running IN this project directory. Over-match causes false HEALTH/ALERT signals and may incorrectly clear RESUME_FLAG when unrelated claude processes exist.
action: Replaced `pgrep -c claude` with `pgrep -f "claude.*${PROJECT_DIR}" | wc -l` to anchor matching to the project directory path. Updated ALERT log message to include PROJECT_DIR for debuggability. Single-file change, no interface contract change (output semantics preserved: CLAUDE_PROCS count used identically downstream).
outcome_evidence: opt-worktree.sh committed and pushed auto/opt-watchdog-shift-1782933809; direction-shift correctly triggered (watchdog.sh listed in .claude/public-interfaces.txt); diff replaces line 54 pgrep invocation with PROJECT_DIR-anchored variant
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: AS-EC-011 (install-studio-hooks.sh missing lint guard registration) — priority 11, route-fix kind
